2606.04365.title: Multi-Granularity 3D Kidney Lesion Characterization from CT Volumes
2606.04365.paper_summary: Radiology reports describe kidney lesions by type, size, enhancement, and attenuation, yet existing 3D methods predict only at the patient or organ level. We reformulate kidney CT characterization as a per-lesion set-prediction task: one model emits a variable number of lesions per kidney, each with four clinical attributes. We curated 2,619 CT volumes from 788 patients at one academic medical center, with multi-granularity side- and per-lesion labels, and used KiTS23 (489 cases) for zero-shot external validation. We propose \textbf{LesionDETR}, a DETR-style architecture with size-distance Hungarian matching and a hierarchical loss that aggregates per-slot outputs to side-level objectives. Across four input representations and six encoder initializations, two design choices dominate: a segmentation mask as an input channel, and same-domain abdominal pretraining (SuPreM); generic large-corpus pretraining is no better than random initialization. LesionDETR reaches bilateral side-level abnormality AUC $0.799 \pm 0.009$ on UF-Health and $0.817 \pm 0.072$ on KiTS23. A count-conditioned variant reaches per-lesion mAP $0.190 \pm 0.083$ on cystic lesions; rare solid-lesion AP stays at the noise floor, pointing to targeted data collection, not architecture, as the next bottleneck. The framework yields verified per-lesion predictions for downstream structured report generation.
2606.04365.paper_summary_zh: 放射科報告根據類型、大小、增強和衰減來描述腎臟病變，但現有的3D方法僅在患者或器官層面進行預測。我們將腎臟CT特徵化重新構造為每個病變的集合預測任務：一個模型為每個腎臟輸出可變數量的病變，每個病變具有四個臨床屬性。我們從一個學術醫療中心整理了2,619個CT影像，來自788名患者，並具有多粒度的側面和每個病變標籤，並使用KiTS23（489例）進行零樣本外部驗證。我們提出了\textbf{LesionDETR}，這是一種DETR風格的架構，具有大小-距離匈牙利匹配和一種層次損失，將每個槽的輸出聚合到側面級目標。在四種輸入表示和六種編碼器初始化中，兩個設計選擇佔主導地位：作為輸入通道的分割掩碼，以及同域腹部預訓練（SuPreM）；通用大型語料庫的預訓練不比隨機初始化好。LesionDETR在UF-Health上達到雙邊側面級異常AUC $0.799 \pm 0.009$，在KiTS23上達到$0.817 \pm 0.072$。一個基於計數的變體在囊性病變上達到每個病變的mAP $0.190 \pm 0.083$；稀有實體病變的AP保持在噪聲底線，指出針對性數據收集，而非架構，將是下一個瓶頸。該框架產生經過驗證的每個病變預測，用於下游結構化報告生成。
2606.04365.author: Renjie Liang et.al.
2606.04365.authors: Renjie Liang, Zhengkang Fan, Jinqian Pan, Chenkun Sun, Jiang Bian, Russell Terry, Jie Xu
